title: Resolution Approving and Adopting Municipal Development Council Resolution Dated July 23, 2020, Resolution No. 2020-08, Resolution Realigning Certain Portions of the 20% Municipal Development Fund Cy 2020 Current Appropriations Amounting to Four Million Six Hundred Fifty Thousand Pesos (P4,650,000.00) for Various Purposes and Approving the Same. (AUTHOR: COUNCILOR GERONIMO A. CICERON, 07/27/2020)
